overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a robed character walking through a mountainous landscape at dusk toward a fantasy village built into cliff faces. The scene transitions from narrow rocky trails to open grassland and finally into a populated village with warm lantern light and atmospheric fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain trail with overhanging cliffs

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a narrow dirt path between rocky cliff faces toward distant village lights

entered.detail: tall rocky cliff face with sparse vegetation on the left side of the path
large rock overhang forming a partial cave ceiling on the right side
narrow winding dirt trail with scattered rocks
wooden post with a lit lantern providing warm light
cluster of warm lights from buildings built into the distant mountain cliff

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow dirt trail through a rocky canyon at dusk. A wooden lantern post provides warm light on the left while a large rock overhang looms on the right. In the distance, the warm lights of a mountain village are visible against the darkening blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland approach to mountain village

events.description: exits narrow rocky canyon into open grassland with clear view of village ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding path through grassy terrain toward the approaching village

entered.detail: rolling hills covered in tall grass and shrubs
grassy slopes with scattered rocks and vegetation
steep mountain cliff with the village built into its base
cluster of wooden houses with lit windows built into the mountainside

segments.scene_description: The path opens into a wide grassland with rolling hills on both sides. The rocky canyon falls behind as the character approaches the mountain village, whose wooden buildings and warm lights become more distinct against the cliff face. The sky is dark blue with scattered clouds.

scene_state.functional_zone: village outskirts with wooden architecture and lantern posts

events.description: enters the village outskirts passing between wooden houses and stone terraces

agents.ego_description: walking through the village outskirts passing lit windows and wooden structures

entered.detail: traditional wooden village houses with thatched or shingled roofs
stone retaining walls and terraces supporting the hillside buildings
wooden posts with hanging lanterns illuminating the path
burning fires providing warm light and smoke

segments.scene_description: The character enters the village proper, walking between wooden houses built on stone terraces. Lantern posts line the dirt path, and the warm glow of windows and campfires contrasts with the cool blue dusk. The atmosphere is misty with smoke rising from fires.

scene_state.functional_zone: village center with stone walls and market stalls

events.description: interaction prompt appears indicating possible interaction with wooden shrine structure
begins following a villager walking ahead on the path

agents.ego_description: following a villager through the village center past wooden stalls and stone walls

notable_agents.action: villager in dark coat and hat walking ahead on the path toward the village center

entered.detail: small wooden shrine or notice board structure with a lantern
tall stone wall forming the boundary of a building or compound
wooden market stall with canvas awning and hanging items

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the village center, passing a wooden shrine structure with an interaction prompt. A villager appears ahead, walking in the same direction. The path is lined with market stalls and stone walls, with warm lantern light illuminating the misty evening atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined rocky canyon into the expansive, lantern-lit heart of a mountain village at dusk. It begins on a narrow dirt trail beneath a looming rock overhang, where a single wooden lantern casts a warm glow against the darkening blue sky. As the character advances, the canyon walls recede and the path opens into a wide grassland with rolling hills, bringing the cliffside village and its distinct wooden structures into clearer view. The scene then shifts into the village proper, moving between stone terraces and wooden houses where the cool blue atmosphere blends with the misty smoke of campfires and glowing windows. Finally, the camera glides through the village center past a wooden shrine and market stalls, following a villager through the warm, lantern-lit evening mist.
